recommendations.title: Man with a Movie Camera
recommendations.overview: A cameraman wanders around with a camera slung over his shoulder, documenting urban life with dazzling inventiveness.

recommendations.title: Waltz with Bashir
recommendations.overview: An Israeli film director interviews fellow veterans of the 1982 invasion of Lebanon to reconstruct his own memories of his term of service in that conflict.

recommendations.title: Savior
recommendations.overview: A hardened mercenary in the Foreign Legion begins to find his own humanity when confronted with atrocities during the fighting in Bosnia.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Under Fire
recommendations.overview: Three U.S. journalists get too close to one another and their work in 1979 Nicaragua.

recommendations.title: The White Helmets
recommendations.overview: As daily airstrikes pound civilian targets in Syria, a group of indomitable first responders risk their lives to rescue victims from the rubble.

recommendations.title: Civil War
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a group of war journalists attempt to survive while reporting the truth as the United States stands on the brink of civil war.

recommendations.title: Night and Fog
recommendations.overview: Filmmaker Alain Resnais documents the atrocities behind the walls of Hitler's concentration camps.

recommendations.title: The Act of Killing
recommendations.overview: In this chilling and groundbreaking documentary, former Indonesian death squad leaders reenact their real-life mass killings in the style of various film genres. As they recreate their past atrocities, the line between reality and performance blurs,

recommendations.title: Collective
